courses.title: Python Fullstack Master Program
courses.shortDescription: Complete Python web development with Django, React, and modern frameworks.
courses.fullDescription: Learn Python programming, Django framework, React frontend, and database integration. Build real-world web applications from scratch. This comprehensive program covers frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React), backend development with Python and Django, database management with SQL and MongoDB, and deployment on cloud platforms.

courses.title: Data Analytics Master Program
courses.shortDescription: Master Excel, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, and Python for data analysis.
courses.fullDescription: Master data analysis from basics to advanced. Learn Excel formulas and functions, SQL queries for data extraction, Power BI dashboards for visualization, Tableau for interactive reports, and Python for advanced analytics. Work on real-world datasets and build a strong portfolio.

courses.title: Cloud DevOps Master Program
courses.shortDescription: AWS, Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, and DevOps practices.
courses.fullDescription: Master cloud computing with AWS services, Linux administration, containerization with Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins. Learn infrastructure as code with Terraform and configuration management with Ansible.
features: AWS Cloud Services (EC2, S3, VPC, Lambda, RDS, IAM)

courses.title: Software Testing Master Program
courses.shortDescription: Manual testing, Selenium automation, API testing, and QA practices.
courses.fullDescription: Comprehensive software testing training covering manual testing concepts, Selenium WebDriver automation with Java/Python, API testing with Postman, and QA methodologies. Learn test case design, defect tracking, and automation frameworks.

courses.title: Data Engineering Master Program
courses.shortDescription: SQL, Python, Spark, Kafka, and cloud data platforms.
courses.fullDescription: Learn data pipeline development, ETL processes, big data technologies like Apache Spark, streaming with Apache Kafka, and cloud data platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP). Master data warehousing concepts and data lake architecture.

courses.title: Data Science with AI Master Program
courses.shortDescription: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, and Generative AI.
courses.fullDescription: Master data science and artificial intelligence with machine learning algorithms, deep learning neural networks, natural language processing, computer vision, and generative AI. Work on real-world AI projects and build a strong portfolio.
